column1: # Domain 5 - Enterprise Active Directory Penetration Testing & Security Auditing
# Phase F - Safe Purple Team Validation
# This normalized dataset measures the effectiveness and completeness of detection
# coverage across Purple Team validation exercises. It documents which adversary
# The dataset provides quantitative evidence supporting detection engineering
# • One coverage assessment per detection scenario.
# • Validation_ID must reference an approved Purple Team exercise.
# • ATT&CK mappings shall use official Technique IDs.
# • Detection gaps must include remediation recommendations.
| **Coverage Metadata**      | Identifies what security capability is being evaluated.               |
| **Detection Mapping**      | Links coverage to specific SIEM rules and detections.                 |
| **Telemetry Visibility**   | Confirms whether sufficient logs exist to support detection.          |
| **MITRE ATT&CK Alignment** | Measures coverage against adversary tactics and techniques.           |
| **Gap Analysis**           | Documents missing detections and operational blind spots.             |
| **Risk & Remediation**     | Connects coverage gaps to business risk and corrective actions.       |
This dataset answers questions such as
Which ATT&CK techniques are fully covered?
Which attack techniques generate telemetry but no alerts?
Which remediation actions should be prioritized?
How mature is the organization's detection capability?
